faqs.question: How much does drain fly treatment cost in Norwood, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment services in Norwood range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, the number of drains affected, and the size of your property. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before starting any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate drain flies in my Norwood property?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly infestations in Norwood can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of initial treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 1-2 weeks as we treat breeding sites and allow the life cycle to complete. We offer same-day service for urgent situations.

faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Norwood homes and apartments?
faqs.answer: Drain flies in Norwood properties are typically caused by organic buildup in drains, pipes, and sewage systems. Older buildings common in Norwood may have aging plumbing with residue accumulation, creating ideal breeding grounds. Bathrooms, kitchens, basement drains, and rarely-used sinks are the most common sources.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your drain fly treatment in Norwood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a service guarantee. If drain flies return within 30 days of treatment due to the original infestation, we'll re-treat your Norwood property at no additional charge. We also provide prevention tips to help keep your drains fly-free long-term.
